status_boundary: PASS_SOURCE_COVERAGE means the POS_GEOM_2017 source text and extracted claims contain the canonical-form, boundary-only logarithmic singularity, and residue-on-boundary recursion language required by the target. It is not a mathematical proof, not a formal residue theorem, not an all-positive-geometries theorem, not substrate evidence, and not a physical settling-law result.

support_summary.allowed_inference: the source-extracted claims contain the required canonical-boundary-recursion ingredients
support_summary.blocked_inference: formal residue theorem, all positive-geometry theorem, S2* theorem, Formation Medium substrate realization, or physical settling law
support_summary.checked_interface: source coverage for canonical form uniqueness/logarithmic-boundary/residue-recursion language
